//: The ttsc/Go plugin config read by @ttsc/unplugin/bun during the Bun.build emit (build.ts): src/main.ts needs BOTH registration and addOptions<T>() lowering. The registration sugar now lowers through the di.core PRESET (`@rhombus-std/di.core/ttsc` -> the `rhombusstd_di_bundle` name the owner host expands into inline -> nameof -> signatureof -> di in canonical order): `add<T>(ctor)` / `addFactory<T>(fn)` / `addValue<I>(value)` are substituted from di.core's rhombus.inline bodies (di.core is a transitive dep, so the inline collector reaches them) into their explicit-token forms (`this.add(nameof<T>(), ctor, signatureof(ctor))`, `this.addValue(nameof<I>(), value)`, etc.), then the primitive stages lower the token (+ dependency-signature array for add/addFactory); the bundle's di stage still lowers the tokenless `resolve`/`resolveAsync` and the trailing `.as<"scope">()`. Both descriptors resolve to the SAME single owner host (transforms/cmd/ttsc-std), so ttsc dedupes them to one spawn. Extends the base tsconfig and declares the two `/ttsc` descriptors. The `types` augmentations are RETAINED: declaration-site matching anchors each authored form on its `declare module '@rhombus-std/di.core'` sugar overload, so the augment must be in the Go program too — both the inline matcher (which discriminates the `add`/`addFactory`/`addValue` overloads by type-param count + value-param NAMES `ctor`/`factory`/`value`) and the di stage anchor on it; the tokenless `add`/`as`/`resolve` sugar declarations live ONLY in di.transformer's augment. @types/bun keeps the Generic Host's process/node:* surface resolved. Lint stays on plain tsc (typescript 5) via the base tsconfig.json.
